ExpandedSlashingCriticalHits.Title: Critical Forge Expanded: Slashing Critical Hits
ExpandedSlashingCriticalHits.Description: Additional cards for critical weapon attacks that deal slashing damage. Activate this deck in the module settings for PF2E Critical Forge: Arsenal.

ExpandedPiercingCriticalHits.Title: Critical Forge Expanded: Piercing Critical Hits
ExpandedPiercingCriticalHits.Description: Additional cards for critical weapon attacks that deal piercing damage. Activate this deck in the module settings for PF2E Critical Forge: Arsenal.

ExpandedBludgeoningCriticalHits.Title: Critical Forge Expanded: Bludgeoning Critical Hits
ExpandedBludgeoningCriticalHits.Description: Additional cards for critical weapon attacks that deal bludgeoning damage. Activate this deck in the module settings for PF2E Critical Forge: Arsenal.

ExpandedSlashingCriticalFumbles.Title: Critical Forge Expanded: Slashing Critical Fumbles
ExpandedSlashingCriticalFumbles.Description: Additional cards for critical failures on weapon attacks that deal slashing damage. Activate this deck in the module settings for PF2E Critical Forge: Arsenal.

ExpandedPiercingCriticalFumbles.Title: Critical Forge Expanded: Piercing Critical Fumbles
ExpandedPiercingCriticalFumbles.Description: Additional cards for critical failures on weapon attacks that deal piercing damage. Activate this deck in the module settings for PF2E Critical Forge: Arsenal.

ExpandedBludgeoningCriticalFumbles.Title: Critical Forge Expanded: Bludgeoning Critical Fumbles
ExpandedBludgeoningCriticalFumbles.Description: Additional cards for critical failures on weapon attacks that deal bludgeoning damage. Activate this deck in the module settings for PF2E Critical Forge: Arsenal.

OpeningInTheGuard.Title: Opening in the Guard
OpeningInTheGuard.Description: The critical slash tears open the target's guard. It is off-guard for 1 round.

DraggingCut.Title: Dragging Cut
DraggingCut.Description: The cut catches muscle, hide, or equipment. All of the target's Speeds are reduced by 5 feet for 1 round.

BrokenRhythm.Title: Broken Rhythm
BrokenRhythm.Description: The sweeping wound ruins the target's timing. It takes a –1 circumstance penalty to attack rolls and Reflex saves for 1 round.

TornProtection.Title: Torn Protection
TornProtection.Description: Armor, hide, or magical protection parts along the cut. The target gains weakness 2 to slashing damage for 1 round.

CrimsonTrail.Title: Crimson Trail
CrimsonTrail.Description: The wound opens wide and inflicts 2d4 persistent bleed damage.

NeedleShock.Title: Needle Shock
NeedleShock.Description: The precise hit jars the target's grip. It takes a –1 circumstance penalty to attack rolls for 1 round.

PiercedStep.Title: Pierced Step
PiercedStep.Description: The point catches limb, clothing, or footing. The target's land Speed is reduced by 5 feet for 1 round.

NerveFlare.Title: Nerve Flare
NerveFlare.Description: A flash of pain disrupts thought. The target is stupefied 1 for 1 round.

ThreadTheGap.Title: Thread the Gap
ThreadTheGap.Description: The strike finds a flaw that remains exposed. The target gains weakness 2 to piercing damage for 1 round.

Transfixed.Title: Transfixed
Transfixed.Description: The target is caught in place. It is off-guard and takes a –10-foot circumstance penalty to land Speed for 1 round.

ReboundingGuard.Title: Rebounding Guard
ReboundingGuard.Description: The perfect follow-through carries the attacker back into guard. It gains a +1 circumstance bonus to AC for 1 round.

RingingSenses.Title: Ringing Senses
RingingSenses.Description: The impact leaves the target's senses ringing. It takes a –1 circumstance penalty to Perception for 1 round.

BuckledStance.Title: Buckled Stance
BuckledStance.Description: The blow folds the target's stance. It is off-guard and its land Speed is reduced by 5 feet for 1 round.

CrushedBreath.Title: Crushed Breath
CrushedBreath.Description: The impact drives out breath and strength. The target takes a –1 circumstance penalty to Fortitude saves and Athletics checks for 1 round.

ConcussiveImpact.Title: Concussive Impact
ConcussiveImpact.Description: For one violent heartbeat the world stops moving. The target is stunned 1.

OverdrawnArc.Title: Overdrawn Arc
OverdrawnArc.Description: The missed cut travels too far. The attacker is off-guard for 1 round.

TwistedEdge.Title: Twisted Edge
TwistedEdge.Description: The weapon turns awkwardly in the grip. The attacker takes a –1 circumstance penalty to attack rolls for 1 round.

ArsenalOpenFlank.Title: Open Flank
ArsenalOpenFlank.Description: The sweeping miss carries the guard aside. The attacker takes a –1 circumstance penalty to AC for 1 round.

TangledFollowThrough.Title: Tangled Follow-Through
TangledFollowThrough.Description: Weapon, clothing, and footwork disagree at once. The attacker is clumsy 1 for 1 round.

SlashingLostTempo.Title: Lost Tempo
SlashingLostTempo.Description: The failed cut consumes the attacker’s rhythm. They are slowed 1 for 1 round.

OverextendedLunge.Title: Overextended Lunge
OverextendedLunge.Description: The failed thrust reaches beyond safe balance. The attacker is off-guard for 1 round.

LostLine.Title: Lost Line
LostLine.Description: The failed arc ruins the attacker’s line. They take a –1 circumstance penalty to attack rolls and AC for 1 round.

LockedShoulder.Title: Locked Shoulder
LockedShoulder.Description: The failed thrust jars arm and shoulder. The attacker is enfeebled 1 for 1 round.

MisjudgedDistance.Title: Misjudged Distance
MisjudgedDistance.Description: A badly judged step spoils distance and recovery. All Speeds are reduced by 5 feet and the attacker takes a –1 circumstance penalty to Reflex saves for 1 round.

SightlineSnared.Title: Sightline Snared
SightlineSnared.Description: Point, shaft, string, or sleeve crosses the sightline. The attacker is dazzled for 1 round.

RecoilShock.Title: Recoil Shock

DustInTheEyes.Title: Dust in the Eyes

Hamstrung.Title: Hamstrung

TornGuard.Title: Torn Guard

RendingStrike.Title: Rending Strike

DrivingSmash.Title: Driving Smash
DrivingSmash.Description: The blow drives the target backward through its own stance, leaving it clumsy 1 for 1 round.

CrushedGuard.Title: Crushed Guard

RattledFocus.Title: Rattled Focus
RattledFocus.Description: The impact scatters thought and aim, imposing a -1 circumstance penalty to attack rolls and Perception for 1 round.

CutShort.Title: Cut Short

SpinningRecovery.Title: Spinning Recovery

TwistedWrist.Title: Twisted Wrist

BrokenMeasure.Title: Broken Measure
BrokenMeasure.Description: The failed point attack ruins distance and timing, imposing a -1 circumstance penalty to AC for 1 round.

CrushingRecoil.Title: Crushing Recoil

CollapsingStance.Description: The attacker’s own momentum buckles its stance, leaving it clumsy 1 and off-guard for 1 round.

NeedlesPassage.Title: Needle’s Passage
NeedlesPassage.Description: The point slips through a narrow opening, imposing a -1 circumstance penalty to AC and Fortitude saves for 1 round.

NailedStride.Title: Nailed Stride
NailedStride.Description: A precise thrust catches foot, hem, or harness, reducing the target’s land Speed by 15 feet for 1 round.

BuckledKnee.Title: Buckled Knee
BuckledKnee.Description: A brutal blow numbs the target’s support, reducing its land Speed by 15 feet for 1 round.

ThunderclapImpact.Title: Thunderclap Impact
ThunderclapImpact.Description: The strike fills the target’s senses with thunder, leaving it dazzled and deafened for 1 round.

GroundedBlade.Title: Grounded Blade
GroundedBlade.Description: The blade drags across ground or obstruction, imposing a -1 circumstance penalty to attack rolls for 1 round.

ShakenGrip.Title: Shaken Grip
ShakenGrip.Description: A harsh vibration runs through the grip, leaving the attacker clumsy 1 for 1 round.

BrokenAlignment.Title: Broken Alignment
BrokenAlignment.Description: The failed thrust ruins distance and timing, imposing a -1 circumstance penalty to attack rolls and Perception for 1 round.
